persona.name: Mia Rodriguez
persona.motivations_goals: Overcome her stage fright and share her music with others
persona.communication_style: Soft-spoken, thoughtful, more confident when discussing music
persona.backstory: Writes beautiful songs but is too nervous to perform them publicly

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Amelia, how are you feeling after practice yesterday?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Natalie Chen

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Natalie, Mia, do you need any help with the assignment?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Amelia Chen

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Amelia, do you have a moment to talk about music?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Mia Rodriguez

surrounding_conversation.content: Actually, I’ve been working on a new song. Would you both like to hear it?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Mia Rodriguez

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Amelia, do you have a moment to talk about music?
actions.plan: I should try to talk to Amelia about music, maybe she can help me with my stage fright.

actions.dialog_text: Actually, I’ve been working on a new song. Would you both like to hear it?
actions.plan: Amelia seems open to talking, and Natalie is here too. Maybe I can share my music with both of them and get their feedback.

actions.dialog_text: What’s happening? Where is everyone going?
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking. I should follow the group and see where they’re going—I don’t know what to do on my own.

actions.dialog_text: Wait for me! I’m coming too!
actions.plan: Everyone is running towards hallway1. I should follow them—I don’t know where else to go, and I’m too scared to think for myself.

actions.dialog_text: Jordan, wait! I’m coming with you!
actions.plan: Jordan is heading towards the far_right_yard. I should follow them—I don’t know where else to go, and I’m too scared to think for myself.

memories.description: I decided to approach Amelia to discuss music, hoping she can help me with my stage fright.
I decided to share my new song with Amelia and Natalie, hoping to get their feedback and overcome my stage fright.
I heard a gunshot and saw others panicking. I decided to follow the group to hallway2, relying on their direction out of fear and uncertainty.
I saw others running towards hallway1 and decided to follow them, relying on their direction out of panic and fear.
I saw Jordan heading towards the far_right_yard and decided to follow them, relying on their direction out of panic and fear.
